cover.era_chip: 朝鮮 前期 · 燕山–明宗
cover.subtitle:
네 번의 피바람,
훈구와 사림이 부딪쳤다.
cover.imagePrompt: Early 16th century Korean illustration. ONE Korean scholar in white scholarly robe and black gat (horsehair hat) standing in a dim seowon (Confucian academy) courtyard at dusk, brush in hand, looking down at a wooden desk with blank scroll. Long shadows from courtyard pillars, fallen autumn leaves. Composition: solitary figure, tense quiet before storm. Color: ink-black + crimson accent + hanji beige + cool gray dusk. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 무오사화. 조의제문이 사초에 실려 김일손 처형.
갑자사화. 폐비 윤씨 사사 진상으로 무차별 숙청.
을사사화. 윤원형의 소윤이 대윤 윤임 제거.

outro.tip_headline:
"무오 조의제문 · 기묘 위훈삭제"
원인을 사화에 묶어라.
outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 4대 사화의 직접 원인(조의제문/폐비 윤씨/위훈삭제/대윤소윤)과 왕(연산군·중종·명종)을 짝지어 묻는다. 조광조의 현량과는 추천제 과거임을 기억할 것.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized broken brush icon with a single ink drop falling, simple ink-line. RIGHT: a small crumpled scroll silhouette suggesting suppressed writings. Cream #F2EDE3 base + crimson #B91C1C accent + ink-black outline. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
